  1. Trier /

Trier · District

Euren

Euren lies southwest on the banks of the Moselle and is a quiet residential neighborhood. From here it is only a few minutes to the UNESCO-listed Igeler Säule (Igel Column), still within easy reach of Trier.

MoselWohnenFamilie

Sights in Euren

Antike
UNESCO

Euren

Igel Column (Igeler Säule)

A Roman funerary column in the Trier suburb of Igel. 23 m tall and richly decorated.

Free admission

Hotels in Euren

★★★★

Euren

Hotel Eurener Hof

Venerable inn in Euren (a district of Trier). Wellness, restaurant, family-friendly.

⭐ 8.8/10 · 920 reviews From 105 €

Live prices via Booking. Zoom in, tap a pin, book.

Trier, älteste Stadt Deutschlands. UNESCO-Welterbe, Mosel-Wein, römisches Erbe - Sehenswürdigkeiten, Hotels, Reise-Guides auf einem Portal.

Cookies & tracking

We use cookies and third-party services (Stay22 for hotel prices, GetYourGuide for tours, Google Analytics, Google AdSense) to load content, analyse usage and show relevant offers. Choose what you want to allow. Details in our privacy policy. privacy policy.
